name: richfrem-agent-plugins-skills
description: A curated collection of AI agent plugins and skills for Claude Code — covering spec-driven development, memory management, context bundling, multi-agent orchestration, CLI sub-agents, and more.

plugins.name: spec-kitty
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development lifecycle + Universal Bridge sync engine — the flagship workflow plugin for AI-assisted feature development.

plugins.name: task-manager
plugins.description: Lightweight kanban task board — directory-backed with zero dependencies. Enforces Kanban Sovereignty constraints preventing manual task file edits.

plugins.name: adr-manager
plugins.description: ADR management skill for generating architecture decisions, documenting design rationale, and maintaining the decision record log.

plugins.name: exploration-cycle-plugin
plugins.description: Autonomous discovery, business requirements capture, and prototyping loop for spec-driven engineering.

plugins.name: agent-agentic-os
plugins.description: Canonical reference and operational guide for the Agentic OS pattern. Covers CLAUDE.md hierarchy, persistent context layers, memory management, session bootstrapping, and hooks-based auto-learning.

plugins.name: agent-loops
plugins.description: Composable agent loop architectures for learning loops, agent orchestration (0-to-N inner agents), and red team coordination. Framework-agnostic.

plugins.name: agent-scaffolders
plugins.description: Meta-plugin containing ecosystem generation primitives. Scaffolding for agent skills, plugins, CLI sub-agents, autonomous GitHub workflows, Azure Foundry agents, and more.

plugins.name: plugin-manager
plugins.description: Orchestration hub for the plugin ecosystem. Manages structural audits, agent environment sync, cross-repo plugin replication, and Universal Bridge Installation.

plugins.name: agent-plugin-analyzer
plugins.description: Systematically analyze agent plugins and skills to extract design patterns, architectural decisions, and reusable techniques. Translates analysis into concrete improvement recommendations.

plugins.name: coding-conventions
plugins.description: Coding standards, documentation conventions, and header templates for Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, and C#/.NET.

plugins.name: dependency-management
plugins.description: Python dependency management with pip-compile locked-file workflow and tiered hierarchy for Python backends.

plugins.name: link-checker
plugins.description: Quality assurance agent for documentation link integrity. Checks, fixes, and audits documentation links across a repository using a deterministic Map-Fix-Verify workflow.

plugins.name: agent-skill-open-specifications
plugins.description: Authoritative reference documentation and execution skills for the Agent Skills and Claude Plugin ecosystem standards.

plugins.name: context-bundler
plugins.description: Bundle source files and documentation into single-file LLM context packages (Markdown or ZIP archives) for portable AI agent distribution.

plugins.name: rlm-factory
plugins.description: Recursive Language Model factory — distill repository files into semantic summaries using Ollama for instant context retrieval.

plugins.name: vector-db
plugins.description: Local Semantic Search Engine powered by ChromaDB with Super-RAG context injection via RLM summaries. Ingest, query, and maintain a persistent vector store.

plugins.name: tool-inventory
plugins.description: Manage tool registries with embedded ChromaDB for semantic tool discovery — self-contained with vendored RLM scripts.

plugins.name: memory-management
plugins.description: Tiered memory system for cognitive continuity across agent sessions. Manages hot cache and deep storage with configurable promotion/demotion rules.

plugins.name: claude-cli
plugins.description: Claude CLI sub-agent system for persona-based analysis. Pipes large contexts to Anthropic models for security audits, architecture reviews, and QA analysis.

plugins.name: gemini-cli
plugins.description: Gemini CLI sub-agent system for persona-based analysis. Pipes large contexts to Google Gemini models for security audits, architecture reviews, and QA analysis.

plugins.name: copilot-cli
plugins.description: Copilot CLI sub-agent system for persona-based analysis. Pipes large contexts to GitHub Copilot models for security audits, architecture reviews, and QA analysis.

plugins.name: excel-to-csv
plugins.description: Convert Excel files (entire workbooks or specific worksheets/tables) into CSV format. Includes L5 Delegated Constraint Verification for strict artifact linting.

plugins.name: markdown-to-msword-converter
plugins.description: Convert Markdown files to MS Word (.docx) documents. Includes L5 Delegated Constraint Verification for strict binary artifact linting.

plugins.name: mermaid-to-png
plugins.description: Convert Mermaid diagrams (.mmd) into high-resolution PNG images via headless Puppeteer.

plugins.name: obsidian-integration
plugins.description: Obsidian Agent Integration Suite — vault operations, markdown parsing, canvas creation, graph traversal, and bases management for AI-assisted Obsidian workflows.

plugins.name: huggingface-utils
plugins.description: HuggingFace integration utilities for Soul persistence — validates credentials, manages dataset structure, and provides upload primitives with exponential backoff.

plugins.name: rsvp-speed-reader
plugins.description: Converts documents into word-by-word RSVP token streams with ORP alignment for speed reading. Supports .txt, .md, .pdf, and .docx input files.

plugins.name: voice-writer
plugins.description: Transform AI-generated or over-polished writing into authentic human voice. Supports voice profile calibration so the agent learns your specific style.

plugins.name: agent-execution-disciplines
plugins.description: Core execution disciplines for AI agents: test-driven development, systematic debugging, verification before completion, code review workflows, and git worktree patterns.
